meta.title: Salesflow
meta.description: A Japanese-style estimate and invoice dashboard.

sidebar.workspaceDescription: A Japanese invoice workflow dashboard for freelancers and small teams

hero.title: Japanese invoice operations in one place
hero.description: Check estimates, delivery notes, invoices, clients, and payment status at a glance, then jump straight into work.

summary.title: See the most important work right away
summary.description: We grouped invoices due this week, unsent estimates, and items waiting for payment by priority.

quickActions.title: Quick actions
quickActions.description: Your most-used documents and management menus are organized as cards.

items.title: Estimate
items.description: Create one from a template in minutes

items.title: Delivery Note
items.description: Convert from estimate data in one click

items.title: Invoice
items.description: Auto-organize tax rates and due dates

items.title: Order Management
items.description: Track project progress and amounts at a glance

items.title: Clients
items.description: Manage contacts and payment terms together

items.title: Item Management
items.description: Save common services as reusable catalog items

timeline.title: Recent document flow
timeline.description: Quickly check issue status and due dates by client.

tips.title: Habits that make invoicing faster
items: Convert estimates into delivery notes and invoices automatically to reduce input work
Template payment deadlines and honorifics for each client
Finish invoice PDF generation and email delivery on the same screen
Prioritize only unpaid items to reduce missed collections

items.title: We launched a new UI for sending invoices by email
We improved tax rate display for Japan's invoice system
Draft saving is now available for recurring invoices

smartAction.title: You can automate overdue payment reminders too
smartAction.description: Once Supabase is connected, this structure can naturally support reminder automation based on issue dates, due dates, and payment status.
